content.problemStatement:
### **Aptitude Practice Question**

Three pipes A, B and C are connected to a tank. Out of the three, A and B are the inlet pipes and C is the outlet pipe. If opened separately, A fills the tank in 10 hours, B fills the tank in 12 hours and C empties the tank in 30 hours. If all three are opened simultaneously, how much time does it take to fill/empty the tank?

---

### **Answer & Explanation**

Let the capacity of tank be LCM (10, 12, 30) = 60 units

=> Efficiency of pipe A = 60 / 10 = 6 units / hour

=> Efficiency of pipe B = 60 / 12 = 5 units / hour

=> Efficiency of pipe C = - 60 / 30 = - 2 units / hour (Here, '-' represents outlet pipe)

=> Combined efficiency of pipes A, B and C = 6 + 5 - 2 = 9 units / hour

Therefore, time taken to completely fill the tank = 60 / 9 = 6 hours 40 minutes
